task: Fix edu training Day 0 tab bouncing back to Day 1

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence mapped to the user-visible issue and runtime verification before final reporting.
Code and UI changes require completion evidence guard and a real user-facing or runtime entrypoint check.

changes: Stopped the initial session bootstrap effect from rerunning for the same email/caseId when local stage changes.
Prevents a Day 0 tab click from being overwritten by a repeated fetchSession/pickStage/hydrate cycle that can restore Day 1.
